title: pogostemon globulosus
intro: Pogostemon globulosus, also known as Patchouli, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its square stems and small, pale purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Pogostemon globulosus include reducing stress, promoting skin health, and supporting digestion, among others. Pogostemon globulosus can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and topical creams for various uses, including aromatherapy and skincare.
